quotes.text: « J'aime les nuages… les nuages qui passent… là-bas… là-bas… les merveilleux nuages ! »
quotes.trans: I love the clouds… the clouds that pass… up there… up there… the marvelous clouds!

quotes.text: Spring remembered every petal, but forgot who I was waiting for.
The seasons keep their faith — but we who swore to meet beneath each moon have let time break.
A kid wanted to be a scientist, but lost precious things on the road.

_note: Coda 引文库。将来可迁移 sqlite;特定 post 可在 frontmatter 里固定自己的 coda,否则随机抽。
